title: Cap. 104 sub. leg. C
text:
Ferry Services (The “Star” Ferry
Company, Limited) (Determination of Fares) Order(Cap. 104, section
19(1))
[15 June 1982](Format changes—E.R. 2 of 2012)
1. Citation This order may be cited as the Ferry Services (The “Star” Ferry Company, Limited) (Determination of Fares) Order.
2. Determination of fares The maximum fares that the grantee may charge for the routes specified in the Schedule shall, for the services specified in relation to those routes, be the amounts specified in the Schedule.(L.N. 12 of 2009)
2A. Determination of rate of increase of fares The maximum rate of increase that may be permitted by the Commissioner under section 19(3) of the Ordinance within the schedule of maximum fares determined under section 19(1)(a) of the Ordinance shall be 50%. (L.N. 580 of 1994)
3. Interpretation In the Schedule—child (兒童) means a person under 12 years of age. (L.N. 259 of 1988)
